title: PM Domain Cross-Domain Dependency Activation Planning
objective: Define the activation plan for the PM/work domain's deferred dependencies on org, identity, asset, audit, and integration surfaces without creating activation SQL or inventing upstream domain objects.
required_inputs: Current known owning-domain surfaces for org, identity, asset, audit, and integration
Read-only runtime touchpoints confirmed by packet 010b
constrained_outputs: A dependency-activation planning handoff note under c:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform/ops/agents/handoffs/
A dependency inventory with owning domains and prerequisites
A sequencing plan for later activation packets
No FK activation DDL, no invented upstream schema objects, no runtime implementation
validation_steps: Confirm the dependency plan starts from the exact deferred items recorded in packet 008
Confirm dependencies are grouped by owning domain and prerequisite rather than treated as one generic backlog
Confirm packet 011 excludes activation SQL and focuses on ownership, sequencing, and validation gates
Confirm runtime-adoption and read-surface assumptions are aligned with packets 010 through 010b when relevant
sql_permission_note: Planning only. Packet 011 does not authorize activation DDL, FK creation, trigger creation, or runtime changes.
